description: Seeded block randomization run independently within each stratum, guaranteeing arm balance within every subgroup (e.g. site, sex, disease stage).
rules: read-only — reads a JSON spec, writes a CSV; mutates no live service
seeded — each stratum uses seed+offset so the schedule is reproducible
strata is a dict {label: count} or a list of per-unit labels
needs numpy + pandas; no network or GPU
usage: Set SPEC_JSON to a JSON file with keys: strata (required dict {label:n} or list[str]), arms (list[str]), block_size (int), ratio (list[int]), seed (int). Output: allocation_schedule.csv under record_store.
limitation: Too many strata (over-stratification) leaves tiny blocks and can undermine balance. No power/sample-size calculation.
